| Fabricate Silver Circuit Boards | 2 | 3 ticks | Basic Crafting 2 |
| Fluorine Nano-Etch Circuits | 5 | 6 ticks | Advanced Crafting 4, Gas Processing 9 |
| Reclaim Circuit Boards | 1 | 8 ticks | Salvaging 5 |
